text:
(CLM-VBP-PRTCPNT-IND-CD) that is present on the first claim record included in the stay. 
If there is no Claim VBP Participant Indicator code on the first claim, then the first found code on any of 
the other claims that make up the stay is used. 

This field is new in 2011.
